name: Altar of Memories
text: When a friendly unit dies, you may exhaust me to draw 1, then put a card from your hand on the top or bottom of your Main Deck.
text_rich: When a friendly unit dies, you may exhaust me to draw 1, then put a card from your hand on the top or bottom of your Main Deck.
accessibility_text: Riftbound Gear: Altar of Memories. When a friendly unit dies, you may exhaust me to draw 1, then put a card from your hand on the top or bottom of your Main Deck.

legality.notes: No specific Standard Constructed ban found in official first-bans announcement as of 2026-03-30.
